title: Digital product assets
summary: Creation and preparation of product-facing visual assets for digital presentation and future commerce use.

lensAssignments.rationale: The responsibility centres on creating, managing, transforming or delivering media to an audience.
This is a distinct supporting responsibility: The responsibility centres on meaning, recognition, identity, visual language or the designed human experience.
lensAssignments.lensSummary: Brand and experience-system responsibility: Creation and preparation of product-facing visual assets for digital presentation and future commerce use.
